package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for repeated_large_map_literal_response_construction: Large map-literal response assembly on hot routes where a stable typed response would be cheaper.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule335NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule335NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule335NegativeRecord) (Rule335NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario335Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule335NegativeService, input Rule335NegativeRecord) (Rule335NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule335NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
